validation.visualQA: Button and Icon Button passed after label spacing and icon contrast checks
validation.formFieldStatus: component set complete; structural + visual QA passed
validation.formFieldCorrections: Base bindings realigned to mockup shared.tsx: label color/text/secondary (#5c6478), required indicator color/status/danger (#b91c1c). Previous values were color/text/primary and color/text/muted.
validation.focusRingException: Checkbox, Radio and Toggle State=Focused use a DROP_SHADOW ring with literal rgba(29,63,115,0.35). setBoundVariableForEffect forces alpha=1, which makes an opaque ring invisible against the navy Checked=True/On=True fill.
validation.toggleOffTrackException: Mockup off-track #cbd5e1 has no Color-collection semantic token; nearest Primitive by normalized RGB distance is neutral/300 (#dde2ea, d=0.094) over neutral/400 (#b0b8c8, d=0.184).
validation.toggleDisabledException: Toggle Disabled uses 45% node opacity (matches mockup disabled:opacity-45) instead of a distinct fill colour.
validation.sharedPropertyMergeBug: combineAsVariants merges same-named TEXT/INSTANCE_SWAP component properties into ONE shared property across the whole set, forcing every variant's displayed value to the shared default. Correct for freely-overridable content (Button Label, Avatar Initials, Progress Value/Max, Alert/Toast Title/Description). Wrong when the value must track the variant (Type Badge label, Alert/Toast Icon) -- bake those per-variant instead of linking a shared property.
validation.iconPlaceholderFillBug: New icon components must set visible:false on their placeholder white frame fill (matches ChevronRight/Check convention). visible:true is invisible on white canvas but shows as a white box on any tinted surface -- caught on Alert Warning/Info, fixed on Icon/AlertCircle and Icon/InfoCircle.
validation.buttonDestructiveStyle: Added Style=Destructive (9 variants) from SettingsPage.tsx ConfirmRemoveUserAccess. Default/Hover use color/status/danger and new Primitive red/800 (derived via the same darkening ratio observed between navy/700 and navy/800). Disabled uses 45% node opacity on the same red rather than Primary/Secondary's neutral bg-swap disabled pattern, matching the mockup's disabled:opacity-45 exactly.
validation.resizeSizingModeBug: node.resize() resets primaryAxisSizingMode/counterAxisSizingMode/layoutSizingHorizontal back to FIXED. Hit three times this session (Alert description clipped, Dialog collapsed to 10px, Dropdown Menu collapsed to 10px). Always resize() first, then set AUTO/HUG/FILL sizing modes last.
validation.dropdownComposition: Dropdown Menu composed of Menu Item instances + an optional section-label wrapper frame (TEXT nodes have no padding property -- must wrap in a frame). Elevation/Overlay per P1 rule 6.
validation.drawerComposition: Header (Type Badge instance + id text + title text + two Icon Button Ghost instances for Expand/Close) + a Content Slot for the screen-specific field grid. Border-left only -- docked panel, not an overlay.
validation.atomicFailureNote: A failed use_figma script is fully atomic -- nothing it did persists, including earlier page/frame creation in the same script. Hit once building Dropdown (a TEXT-node padding error partway through silently voided the whole page); required re-verifying with get_metadata before rebuilding rather than assuming partial state.

nextStep: AWAITING_PLAN_2_CONFIRMATION -- do not build further; wait for user's CONFIRM PLAN 2 before starting Plan 3 (P3_UX_Patterns_and_BE_Contracts)
